message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 153 progress comment

RusticMaple: snapshot_engine.rs — capture_from_provider_with_cx
added + 4 call-sites migrated in scheduler_body (cx-aware path).
Also pruned false positives: pool.rs _inner fns are tokio-only;
snapshot_engine.rs had 4 false positives in its naive scan
(generic helpers, already-cx-taking, and legacy-only fns).
